description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with the default Docker image and set GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY to normal. Add an arduino job (default stage) that runs before_script apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq python3-serial then executes bash test/ci/test_arduino.sh. Add a catch_testing job that runs before_script apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq cmake, apt-get install libboost-system-dev -y -qq, cmake . -DCMAKE_CXX_FLAGS="-Wall -Werror", make and then script run-parts --regex catch_ bin/. Add a platformio job that runs before_script apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq pipx, pipx install platformio, export PATH="$PATH:~/.local/bin" and then script bash test/ci/test_platformio.sh --random. Add a pages job that runs only on the master branch, installs doxygen via apt-get, runs doxygen doxygen/Doxyfile, moves the generated HTML to public/, and publishes the public/ directory as an artifact. Add a pages_develop job that runs only on the develop branch, performs the same doxygen steps, moves the HTML to html/, and publishes the html/ directory as an artifact.
